description: Reviewed candidate maintenance schedules recovered from the Hermes expansion run

review_rules: No candidate in this directory may set production_ready=true.
Condition-based maintenance remains condition-based; fixed intervals are not invented.
Severe-use services must not be presented as normal-use requirements.
Rendered-page verification is required before integration into the canonical dataset.
Variant-specific engine, transmission, and drivetrain rules must be split or explicitly scoped.
